Exceptional Auto Restoration Services by Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop

Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop specializes in bringing your car back to life with top-tier auto restoration services. Whether you need body work, paint work, glass work, or restoration of classic and antique cars, we've got you covered. Our services include:


  • Bodywork
  • Paintwork
  • Glass work
  • Classic or antique car restoration
  • Modern car restoration


Call (786) 339-7651 today to discuss your auto restoration needs.


Benefits of Choosing Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop

We offer numerous benefits that make us the ideal choice for your auto restoration needs:


  • Family and locally owned and operated since 2017
  • Free estimates
  • High-quality service
  • Lifetime repair warranty
  • Military discounts
  • Over 10 years of experience
  • Paint and auto body certifications
  • Same-day estimates
  • Service provided within a few days
  • We speak English and Spanish


Contact us now to experience these benefits firsthand.


Contact Us
